name: I-Amoxicillin
description: I-Broad-spectrum aminopenicillin antibiotic. I-Oral prophylactic antibiotic yokutheleleka kwesilonda. Ingxenye yephakethe lephilisi lokulwa le-TCCC lokuvimbela amanxeba ekulimaleni okunganzima.
indications: I-prophylaxis yokutheleleka ngenxeba (amanxeba aphakathi nendawo, iphakethe lamaphilisi omlomo)
dose: 500 mg PO njalo ngamahora angu-8 x izinsuku ezingu-7 (ukuvimbela amanxeba). 875 mg PO njalo ngemva kwamahora angu-12.
window: Qala phakathi kwamahora angu-3 wokulimala ukuze uthole i-nxeba prophylaxis.
contraindications: Ukwaliwa yi-penicillin okwaziwayo (sebenzisa i-doxycycline esikhundleni salokho)
warnings: Uma i-penicillin iguliswa: esikhundleni se-doxycycline 100mg PO BID.
Umzila odluliselwa ngomlomo kuphela -- sebenzisa ama-antibiotic IV (cefazolin/ciprofloxacin) amanxeba amabi noma uma ngomlomo kungabekezeleleki.

pediatric.dose: 25-45 mg/kg/ngosuku ihlukaniswe q8h (ubukhulu 500 mg/dosi). Sebenzisa ireferensi ye-Broselow esekelwe esisindweni.

obstetric.note: Kuphephile ekukhulelweni. Kukhethwa kune-doxycycline (okungavunyelwe ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa).

source: JTS CPG: Wound Care / TCCC Combat Pill Pack
